race.comment: BRUCEY (5) couldn't meet strong market expectation on debut but willing to forgive off his trial form. Better for the run and the rise to 1200m shouldn't bother. KENNY'S SWANS (2) finished full of running here earlier this month when missing by a head. Is sure to have come on from that, though will need a touch of luck from the wide draw. KIWI HARMONY (10) finds it tough to break through but could improve sharply with the blinkers going on. Gets in light with the claim and is worth keeping in mind. MISS HARD COPY (8) a big watch on debut with the gun jockey booked.
